title: Interior garnish/lining removal and inspection - Pillar area - Side curtain airbags

crossRefs.label: Remove the necessary amount of front door opening seal (A).
Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment
Front seat belt upper anchor removal
Rear seat belt lower anchor removal

blocks.text: Interior garnish/lining removal and inspection - Pillar area - Side curtain airbags

items: If there are components of the SRS airbag system in the vicinity, refer to the work precautions and configuration drawings described for the SRS airbag system before proceeding.

blocks.text: 1. Front pillar garnish removal
Remove the necessary amount of front door opening seal (A). Pull the front pillar garnish (B) toward you to unlock the upper clip (C).

refs.label: Remove the necessary amount of front door opening seal (A).

blocks.text: Remove the clip (A), and pull up the front pillar garnish (B) to remove it. Upper clip (C) is left on the body side.
Remove the upper clip (A).
2. Front pillar garnish Inspection

If the side curtain airbags are deployed, replace them with new front pillar garnishes (A). If the side curtain airbags have not deployed, perform the following inspection and replace any applicable items.

items.text: The upper clip (B) is not reusable and must be replaced.
The upper clip (B) is not reusable and must be replaced.
Whitening/cracking of clip (C) and clip seat (D)
Whitening/cracking of clip (C) and clip seat (D)

blocks.text: 3. Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment

refs.label: Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment

blocks.text: 4. Installation Precautions
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items.text: The upper clip (A) is not reusable and must be replaced.
The upper clip (A) is not reusable and must be replaced.
Ensure that the airbag is not engaged by the clip.
Ensure that the airbag is not engaged by the clip.
Garnish is not pushed too far.
Garnish is not pushed too far.

blocks.text: 1. Front side garnish removal
2. Rear side garnish removal
3. Center pillar lower garnish removal
Shift the front seat all the way forward. Remove the seat belt (C) from the slit (B) in the center pillar lower garnish (A) and remove the garnish.
4. Front seat belt upper anchor removal

refs.label: Front seat belt upper anchor removal

blocks.text: 5. Center pillar upper garnish removal
Remove the front door opening seal (A) and rear door opening seal (B) as required.

Pull out the lower end of the center pillar upper garnish (A) and remove the hook (B). Pull down the garnish to remove the overlap with the roof lining (C) and remove the hook (D) from the hole in the body.
6. Center pillar upper/lower garnish Inspect

If the side curtain air bag is deployed, replace it with a new center pillar upper garnish (A) and center pillar lower garnish (B). If the side curtain airbags have not deployed, perform the following inspection and replace any applicable items.

items.text: Deformation/cracking of garnish, deformation/cracking of top hook and whitening of top edge of garnish
Deformation/cracking of garnish, deformation/cracking of top hook and whitening of top edge of garnish

blocks.text: 7. Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment

refs.label: Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment

blocks.text: 8. Installation Precautions
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
1. Cargo side lining removal
2. Rear seat belt lower anchor removal

refs.label: Rear seat belt lower anchor removal

blocks.text: 3. Rear pillar garnish removal

Remove the rear opening trim (A) and tailgate weather strip (B) as required. Pull the lower part of the rear pillar garnish (C) toward you and remove the clips (D, E). Pull down the garnish to remove the overlap with the roof lining (F) and remove the hook (G) from the hole in the body.
4. Rear pillar garnish Inspection

If the side curtain air bag is deployed, replace it with a new rear pillar garnish (A). If the side curtain airbags have not deployed, perform the following inspection and replace any applicable items.

items.text: Deformation/cracking of garnish, deformation/cracking of top hook and whitening of top edge of garnish
Deformation/cracking of garnish, deformation/cracking of top hook and whitening of top edge of garnish
Whitening/cracking of clip (B) and clip seat (C)
Whitening/cracking of clip (B) and clip seat (C)

blocks.text: 5. Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment

refs.label: Wrap allowance for roof lining/pillar garnish Adjustment

blocks.text: 6. Installation Precautions
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
